occupation: Head of Malls & Group Business Development Director at Multiply Media Group
headline: Head of Malls & Group Business Development Director
summary: Experienced Media Director with a demonstrated history of working in the marketing and advertising industry. Skilled in Negotiation, Marketing Management, Commercial Leasing, Account Management, and Direct Sales. Strong marketing professional with a Associate of Arts and Sciences (AAS) focused in Business Administration and Management, General from Lebanese American University.

experiences.title: Head of Malls & Group Business Development Director
Head of Malls and Business Development at BackLite Media
Media Sales Director
experiences.description:
•	Works with direct clients and agencies to uncover business needs and objectives, craft appropriate strategies, and identifies/implements products to help achieve client goals. 
•	Develop & Launch the only “Nationwide Digital Network” in UAE across 21 malls
•	Create and interpret effective analysis to support sales recommendations. 
•	Develop broad industry expertise. 
•	Build and Grow Client Relationships 
•	Understand clients' business and generate new ideas to enhance client spend inside the malls
•	Build trust, credibility, and client referrals. 
•	Effectively Manage Team 
•	Manage a team of 8 people including 3 sales managers 
•	Foster teamwork and a constructive work environment. 
•	Provide team leadership that rewards additional revenue 
•	Manage Financial Performance 
•	Achieve client targets within the context of the underlying opportunity. 
•	Maintain or improve account profitability. 
•	Develop new client sales proposals. 
•	Work collaboratively with Senior Management, participate in company strategizing, and make recommendations for changes to the sales strategy function to meet market changes, competitive threats or to support strategic plans.

experiences.title: Senior Sales Manager
experiences.description:
•	Strategic selling to contribute to the sales target of the complete Advertising sales team. 
•	Managing the ad spends of multinational and regional brands within allocated budgets. 

•	Handling Emaar Malls (The Dubai Mall; The Dubai Marina Mall and Emaar Community Centers) in addition to all community centers in terms of branding.
•	Handling over 1200 retailers within Emaar Shopping Malls and in looking after their in mall branding needs.
•	Looking after the key & essential retail groups such as Chalhoub, Al Tayer, Landmark, Apparel, and Azadea. 
•	Developing the best relationship with all brands and marketing managers from various multinational and local brands and creating a solid interest for them to spend in the mall.
•	Achieve or exceed the promotions & media revenue targets set by the Mall Promotions & Media Director for each operating property.
•	Prepare all necessary documentations (including but not limited to proposals, license agreements, letters) to ensure Hypermedia and my team is properly represented in the event of any default, either monetary or non-monetary.
•	Reporting directly to the Hypermedia’s Director on a weekly basis.
•	Assisting with developing new ideas that could help generating more revenue and make the company grow such as new branding opportunities and exclusive offers.
•	Making sure I achieve 15 meetings on a weekly basis to generate a healthy pipeline and to keep the relationship ongoing with my clients, and most importantly to remain on top of everything.
•	Handling a team of 3 executives and monitoring them in terms of sales target.

education.degree_name: Associate of Arts and Sciences (AAS), Business Administration and Management, General
